summary: Frontend-only smoke test of fully-filled-grid levels for the Arrow Puzzle Escape game (Expo web preview, mobile viewport 390x844). Verified Level 1 (3x3 = 9 arrows) and Level 2 (3x4 = 12 arrows) render every cell, solve correctly in array index order, lose on wrong-order tap, retry re-initializes, NEXT navigates, level-select unlocks propagate, and levels-reset-btn clears progress. All 8 review-request scenarios passed.

issues: Console emits RN-Web deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated (use boxShadow), 'textShadow*' style props are deprecated (use textShadow). Non-blocking but should be migrated for forward compatibility with React Native Web.

action_items: Optional: migrate shadow*/textShadow* StyleSheet props to boxShadow/textShadow to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings (cosmetic, not blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: game.tsx line 229: recordWin(levelId, moves + 1, list.length) — uses list.length (which still includes broken+escaped arrows). Since you only call this when allOut===true, list.length === level.arrows.length, so this is currently correct. Worth a comment to avoid future regressions if partial-escape logic is added.

levels.tsx line 80: locked = progress ? id > progress.highestUnlocked : id !== 1 — fine; just note that during the initial render before progress loads, tiles >1 momentarily render as locked which is the desired UX.
game.tsx is 717 lines — within budget but bordering the 700-line guideline. Consider extracting <ArrowCell /> and <WinLoseModal /> components if more game logic is added.
seed_data_creation: None. Cleared localStorage at test start to ensure fresh progress state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Game uses testID `arrow-{levelId}-{idx}` where idx is 0-based array order = solve order. Wait ~700-750ms between consecutive arrow taps (animation is dist*80ms + 180ms fade, max ~700ms for cross-board flights). Modal-won fires Haptics + recordWin asynchronously. Level 1 = 3x3=9, Level 2 = 3x4=12, scaling up to 6x6=36 at level 11/12. To reset progress before a fresh test run, either clear localStorage in browser (key `arrow_escape_progress_v1`) or tap levels-reset-btn. All 12 handcrafted levels are algorithmically pre-verified solvable.

test_results.level_1_renders_9_arrows: PASS (arrow-1-0..arrow-1-8 all visible, stat-arrows shows 9/9, game-level-id='01')
test_results.retry_reinitializes: PASS (modal-restart-btn closes modal and 9/9 arrows are back idle)
test_results.level_2_solve_in_order: PASS (taps 0..11 → modal-won with 3 stars, screenshot at /tmp/l2_won.png)
test_results.levels_unlocks_propagate: PASS (after winning L1+L2, tiles 1 and 2 show numbers+filled stars, tile 3 shows number+outline stars (unlocked), tile 4 shows lock icon)
test_results.levels_reset_btn_clears: PASS (after reset, tile-1 shows '1', tile-2 text is empty = locked)
